title: helictochloa schelliana
intro: Helictochloa schelliana, also known as Schell's false oat-grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family (Poaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Helictochloa schelliana include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to help manage digestive issues and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Helictochloa schelliana are typically made from the plant's leaves and flowers, and can be used in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
